    % dp_0 is a list of counts, one for each number in ValidNums[0].
    DP0 = lists:map(fun(_) -> 1 end, ValidNums[0]),
    
    % Iterative DP calculation
    DP = lists:foldl(fun(PrevDP, i) ->
        % Current required digit sum and its valid numbers
        CurrentDS = DigitSum !! i,
        CurrentValidNums = ValidNums !! i,
        
        % If no numbers are valid for this step, the count for this stage is 0.
        if lists:is_empty(CurrentValidNums) -> 
            [];
        true ->
            % Calculate the new DP list (CurrentDP) for stage i.
            CurrentDP = lists:map(fun(current_num) ->
                % current_num is the k-th element of CurrentValidNums
                
                % Sum up counts from PreviousDP (stage i-1) where the previous number
                % is less than or equal to current_num.
                PrevCount = sum_counts_le(PrevDP, CurrentValidNums !! i, ValidNums !! (i-1)),
                
                % Modulo arithmetic
                (PrevCount rem Mod)
            end, CurrentValidNums),
            CurrentDP
    end, DP0, {1, N-1}), % Start from index 1 (second element)
    
    % --- Re-implementing DP iteratively using explicit indexing for clarity in Erlang ---

    % DP_table[i] is a list of size |ValidNums[i]|.

        lists:map(fun(_) -> 1 end, ValidNums !! 0)
    ],
    
    % Loop from i = 1 to N-1
    Final_DP_table = lists:foldl(fun(Table, i) ->
        PrevDP = last(Table),
        CurrentValidNums = ValidNums !! i,
        PrevValidNums = ValidNums !! (i-1),
        
        CurrentDP = lists:map(fun(current_num) ->
            % current_num is the k-th element of CurrentValidNums
            
            % Count how many entries in PrevDP correspond to a previous number <= current_num
            Count = sum_prev_counts(PrevDP, CurrentValidNums !! i, PrevValidNums, Mod),
            
            (Count rem Mod)
        end, CurrentValidNums),
        
        Table ++ [CurrentDP]
    end, DP_table, lists:seq(1, N-1)),

    % Final result: Sum all elements in the last DP array (DP_table[N-1])
    case lists:last(Final_DP_table) of
        [] -> 0;
        LastDP ->
            TotalSum = lists:sum(LastDP),
            (TotalSum rem Mod)
    end.

-module(solver).
-export([solve/1]).

%% Helper function to calculate the sum of digits
sum_digits(N) ->
    case N of
        0 -> 0;
        _ -> 
            Digits = [X || X <- lists:map(mod(10), lists:reverse(integer_to_list(N)))],
            lists:sum(Digits)
    end.

%% Precompute valid numbers for each required digit sum within the range [0, 5000]
% Returns a map: DigitSum -> List of valid numbers (sorted)
precompute_valid_numbers(MaxN) ->
    ValidNumbersMap = lists:foldl(fun(Acc, N) ->
        DigitSum = sum_digits(N),
        case maps:find(DigitSum, Acc) of
            none -> maps:put(DigitSum, [N], Acc);
            Some -> maps:put(DigitSum, [N|Some], Acc)
        end
    end, #{}, 0..MaxN),
    % Sort lists in the map
    lists:foldl(fun(Acc, Key, List) ->
        maps:put(Key, lists:sort(List), Acc)
    end, ValidNumbersMap, maps:keys(ValidNumbersMap)).

%% Dynamic Programming function
%% dp(i, prev_val) calculates the number of ways to form a valid suffix starting from index i,
%% given that the previous element arr[i-1] was prev_val.
% The state space is too large for memoization on prev_val directly.
% Instead, we use DP based on index i and the *value* of arr[i-1], but since the values are up to 5000,
% and there are many numbers for a given sum, we must iterate over possible values.

solve(DigitSum) ->
    MaxN = 5000,
    ValidNumbersBySum = precompute_valid_numbers(MaxN),
    N = length(DigitSum),

    % dp[i] will store a map: PreviousValue -> Count
    % Since the number of possible values is large, we'll use recursion with memoization
    % based on the index i and the previous value.

    % Memoization table: memo[Index-1][PrevValue] = Count
    % We use an association list or a map for memoization.

    % Start the DP process.
    case dp_recursive(DigitSum, ValidNumbersBySum, N, 0, -1, #{}) of
        {Count, _} -> Count
    end.

%% dp_recursive(DigitSum, ValidNumbersBySum, N, currentIndex, previousValue, Memo) -> {TotalCount, NewMemo}
% currentIndex: The index we are currently trying to fill (i)
% previousValue: The value of arr[i-1]. Use -1 if i=0.
% Memo: Map storing computed results: {currentIndex, previousValue} -> Count
dp_recursive(DigitSum, ValidNumbersBySum, N, I, PrevVal, Memo) ->
    if I == N ->
        % Successfully filled the entire array
        {1, Memo}
    else
        CaseMemo of
            {Count, Memo} when maps:member({I, PrevVal}, Memo) ->
                {Count, Memo};
            _ ->
                {TotalCount, NewMemo} = dfs_step(DigitSum, ValidNumbersBySum, N, I, PrevVal, Memo);
                NewMemo = maps:put({I, PrevVal}, TotalCount, Memo)
        end.

    RequiredSum = DigitSum !! I,
